---
title: "Geotagged tweets to inform a spatial interaction model: A case study of museums"
description: "Robin Lovelace, Nick Malleson, Kirk Harland, and Mark Birkin (2014). Geotagged tweets to inform a spatial interaction model: A case study of museums. *Arxiv working paper*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_geotagged_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Arxiv working paper"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Nick Malleson"
  - "Kirk Harland"
  - "Mark Birkin"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Arxiv working paper
**Year:** 2014

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, Nick Malleson, Kirk Harland, and Mark Birkin (2014). Geotagged tweets to inform a spatial interaction model: A case study of museums. *Arxiv working paper*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_geotagged_2014,
  title = {Geotagged Tweets to Inform a Spatial Interaction Model: A Case Study of Museums},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Malleson, Nick and Harland, Kirk and Birkin, Mark},
  year = {2014},
  journal = {Arxiv working paper},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
